challenge.title: Korak 7
challenge.description:
Kao što ste naučili u prethodnoj lekciji, funkcija enumerate omogućava vam da pratite indeks dok iterirate preko nečega što je iterabilno:

fruits = ['apple', 'plum', 'bananas']

for index, item in enumerate(fruits):
    print(index, item)

# 0 apple
# 1 plum
# 2 bananas

n-ta cifra tajnog koda dolazi iz n-te reči na n-tom redu, pa morate znati koji je broj svakog reda.

Izmenite petlju tako da iterira na enumerate(lines), i dodajte još jednu promenljivu petlje pre line pod nazivom line_index.

Takođe, ažurirajte poziv print na print(line_index, line).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line in lines:
        print(line)
        words = line.split()
        print(words)

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

pin_extractor(poem)

tests.text: The loop should have line_index, line as loop variable.
You should have print(line_index, line) inside the loop.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poems):
    secret_codes = []
    for poem in poems:
        secret_code = ''
        lines = poem.split('\n')
        for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
            words = line.split()
            if len(words) > line_index:
                secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
            else:
                secret_code += '0'
        secret_codes.append(secret_code)
    return secret_codes

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and
until the end of the night"""

poem2 = 'The grass is green\nhere and there\nhoping for rain\nbefore it turns yellow'
poem3 = 'There\nonce\nwas\na\ndragon'

print(pin_extractor([poem, poem2, poem3]))
